Notice Of Motion And Motion Fo 1.Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement 2. Certification Of Settlement Class 3. Approval Of Class Action Settlement Notice And Claim Form And 4. Scheduling Order
Off Calendar Apr-11-2005 Continued To Jun-01-05 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Kenneth Sugarman, Esq. and Steven Zieff, Esq. of Rudy, Exelrod & Zieff, 415- 434-9800 for Plaintiff and Moving party Jackson Chin. David Montgomery, Esq. of Keating , Muething & Klekamp for Defendant and Opposing Party Republic Indemnity Company of America.

RULING:
There was no opposition on this matter.
PLAINTIFFS JACKSON CHIN, SIMONETTE FORTO-GONZALES' Motion For 1. Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement 2. Certification Of Settlement Class 3. Approval Of Class Action Settlement Notice And Claim Form And 4. Scheduling Order IS GRANTED. Moving Party is to provide courtesy copies of their moving papers to Dept. 301 with a cover letter referencing the new hearing date as soon as possible. Matter is continued to June 1, 2005 in Dept. 301 for fairness hearing on final approval of class action settlement. (301/DM/SL) Reporter: Rhonda Fung, CSR: 4819
